channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: The tree that is in the garden of 26 Thirlemere Rise Bromley., 23rd June
item.description:
This tree overhangs the rear garden of Homecoppice House 1 Park Avenue BR14EF. This is a retirement block of flats with elderly residents who walk along the garden pathway. I am concerned that the broken branch and other over hang may break and call causing a possible injury.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park Avenue, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bad layout accident waiting to happen, 23rd June
item.description:
As you can see the is a very bad layout with little or no signs On the left is for cycles followed immediately on the left for vehicles On numerous occasions vehicles have turned left in to the cycle lane thinking that was the turning most have damaged their wheels after ending up on the pavement Only yesterday I nearly got knocked down when crossing the cycle part and a car nearly hit me In the 2nd photo you can see it would be easy to paint a left turn on the road And perhaps a couple of bollards at the start of the cycle lane Needs addressing soon

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 187, Harrow Manorway, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken fence, 23rd June
item.description:
This fence was installed by inspire who now no longer occupie the building. The fence is on tha access pathway with broken top sticking out if a child came round the corner it could cause serious damage. This has been caused by a bush growing between my wall and the boundary of the property which my wall is the boundary the bush and fence is outside my boundary. As bexley now have the building returnd to them as inspire are not responsible for this fence

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Whitehall Lane, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): South Street, Plaistow, Greater London

item.title: Guess who's back. ***** back. Free MOT, free tax, free insurance,free ULEZ charge. No parking tickets enforcement,No speeding tickets, free petrol,, 23rd June
item.description:

item.title: Lose gravel trip hazzard, 23rd June
item.description:
This house has a pebble drive where the stones are always on the public path. They never clear them. It’s a trip hazzard to elderly and needs clearing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bromley Common, Widmore, Greater London

item.title: Car and Vans left there for months, 23rd June
item.description:
Owner intentionally left those van and car there on the double yellow lines and not ready to remove those arguing that he has been keeping his van there since last year and no one should complaint about that.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Broadway, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Vehicle on Blind Bend, 23rd June
item.description:
Vehicle parked/abandoned on blind Bend causing obstruction and dangerous situations. Vehicle was left here two days ago
